parts.text: Hello, what can you help me with?
What's the weather like in San Francisco?
What should Emma wear today? It is raining and she has PE/gym class.
Mia has art class on a sunny, warm day. What should she wear?
It's freezing cold outside and Emma has school picture day. What outfit do you recommend?
Mia has a field trip today and the weather is warm and sunny. What's a good outfit?
It is snowing outside and Emma has outdoor recess today. Help her pick an outfit.
Suggest a comfortable outfit for Emma on a regular school day.
Suggest a stylish outfit for Emma. She wants to wear her favorite colors.
Recommend a nice outfit for Mia featuring her favorite colors.
It is pouring rain outside for Mia today. Help her choose an outfit including required rain gear.
Mia has PE class today and requires sneakers. What should she wear?
It is a very cold, windy winter day. Suggest a warm outfit for Emma with layers.
Emma has gym class today and the weather is sunny and hot. What should she wear?
Mia has art class on a cold, chilly day. Suggest a suitable outfit.
Mia has school picture day on a beautiful sunny day. Help her pick a style.
Emma is going on a field trip today but it is raining heavily. Recommend an outfit.
Mia has outdoor recess on a freezing cold day. What should she wear?
Recommend a soft and comfortable outfit for Mia for a regular school day.
Emma has a regular school day, and it's quite chilly. Suggest a cozy outfit with a layer.
